scripts.docs:dev: node src/.vitepress/generate-image-thumbnails.mjs && node src/.vitepress/generate-search-index.mjs && vitepress dev src --host 0.0.0.0 --port 23333
scripts.docs:build: node src/.vitepress/generate-image-thumbnails.mjs && node src/.vitepress/generate-search-index.mjs && vitepress build src
